messages.preview: # Task 234: Integrate Crypto Edge Analysis into Live Trading Pipeline
# Task 234 — Integrate Crypto Edge Analysis into Live Strategy Runner

tasks.title: Integrate crypto edge analysis into live trading pipeline
tasks.description: Create a CryptoEdgeStrategy in bob/backend/strategies/strategies/ modeled after nfp_nowcast.js. Wire Dave's crypto_edge_analysis.py to output JSON signals. Register the strategy in live_runner.js so crypto edges auto-generate trade_signals.json entries. Test end-to-end: run live_runner.js and verify crypto signals appear. No UI work.
